body: I want a refund for my order #12345, the product arrived broken.
resolution: Refund processed within 5 business days. Replacement also offered if preferred.

body: Where is my order #66721? It's been a week.
resolution: Tracking link shared and carrier ETA explained. SLA: 7-10 business days for this region.

body: Please cancel my order #88001, I changed my mind.
resolution: Order cancelled before shipping; full charge reverted.

body: I can't log in, password reset email never arrives.
resolution: Manual reset link issued; user advised to check spam folder.

body: This service is terrible, worst customer experience ever.
resolution: Escalated to senior CS manager who called the customer.

body: Get me a real person right now.
Can I change the shipping address on order #44210?
resolution: Address updated; courier notified before pickup.

body: I need a copy of the invoice for order #12345 for accounting.
resolution: PDF invoice emailed; also available in user dashboard.

body: My card was declined but my bank says there are no issues.
resolution: Asked user to retry after 10 minutes; rate-limit on payment provider.

body: What is your refund policy on opened items?
resolution: 30-day return policy stated; opened items in original packaging accepted.

body: How do I create a business account?
resolution: Linked to business sign-up flow with VAT field.

body: Please delete my account and all my data (GDPR).
resolution: Confirmed; data deletion within 30 days per privacy policy.

body: What delivery options do you offer for next-day?
resolution: Express same-day in 12 cities, next-day nationwide; surcharge applies.
Yes, 5-10 business day window via DHL.

body: My invoice shows the wrong VAT.
resolution: Corrected invoice issued; finance team CC'd.
